plan: Queue carry as primary. It is your best role at 53.5% over 188 games (your overall is 49.9%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Two-hero rule for the climb: Sparrow and Zinx. You beat the field on them by +10.4 and +7.3 points of winrate.
Your champion pool is 27+ heroes wide and your top three are only 22% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
Park Countess, Lt. Belica, Feng Mao, Mourn for ranked: 39% over 118; 42% over 95; 25% over 59; 33% over 33. Keep them for normals.
The math: you are at 595 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 824.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why
